query:
INSERT INTO failed_scrapes (bbref_game_id, error_message, failed_at, attempt_count)
            VALUES ($1, $2, NOW(), 1)
            ON CONFLICT (bbref_game_id)
            DO UPDATE SET
                error_message = EXCLUDED.error_message,
                failed_at = NOW(),
                attempt_count = failed_scrapes.attempt_count + 1
